description: The chatMutation.onError handler catches AbortError but doesn't handle other common network errors (TypeError for network failures, SyntaxError for invalid JSON). Add explicit error type checks and user-friendly messages for network failures, server errors, and JSON parsing issues.
successCriteria: Error handler distinguishes between AbortError, network failures (TypeError), and other errors
Each error type gets a specific user-facing message
Error messages guide the user on what to do next (retry, check connection, etc.)
